name: claude-hud
description: Real-time statusline HUD for Claude Code - context health, tool activity, agent tracking, and todo progress
description_zh: Claude Code 实时状态栏 HUD - 上下文健康度、工具活动、Agent 跟踪和待办进度

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Detect platform, generate statusline command, backup settings, and apply HUD configuration
commands.description_zh: 检测平台、生成状态栏命令、备份设置并应用 HUD 配置

commands.name: configure
commands.description: Guided configuration flow for HUD display options, presets, and language
commands.description_zh: 引导式配置流程，用于 HUD 显示选项、预设和语言设置
